title: Using a template for a doc
excerpt: I have a template that all items in a board need users to fill out for. Is there any way that I can upload the template to Monday.com (maybe through Monday docs), have the users fill it out, and then send it/receive it b…

posts.author: Soroh (Soroh Donn)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a template that all items in a board need users to fill out for. Is there any way that I can upload the template to Monday.com (maybe through Monday docs), have the users fill it out, and then send it/receive it back signed from a signature platform?
What would be the easiest way to achieve this?

posts.author: kaylak (Kayla K)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Soroh ,

Would using a form work for this?

image1752×853 38.1 KB

To create a form, click on the blue plus like you are adding a new board, but instead of selecting new board, select “New Form”

From this page you can edit the form with different question types (multi/single select, short/long text, and even a signature field along with many other options)

For more information on forms, here is the link from Monday’s website https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360000358700-All-about-monday-WorkForms

Hope this helps!
